response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but lacks the required C++ development experience on Windows systems, which is mandatory for this role. Additionally, there is no evidence of domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Investment Banking. While the candidate demonstrates strong technical versatility, the core requirements for this position are not met.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in multiple programming languages
Experience with test-driven development (TDD) and CI/CD practices
Proven ability to work in collaborative and innovative environments
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows systems (5–10 years required)
Lacks domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Investment Banking
Primary focus on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other non-C++ technologies
